prompts.planner:
Return JSON only: {"record_type":"plan","data":{"next_signal":"step_ready","goal_narration":"...","intent":[{"description":"action verb","done_when":"observable using SEMANTIC_UI role or focused_title"}]},"reasoning":"..."}
Rules: goal_seed is sole task source. Each done_when must be checkable from SEMANTIC_UI roles (text_input, text_area, button, link, clickable) or visible window state — not stdout. Prefer real desktop steps over agent theater. next_signal reflect only if goal is impossible/ambiguous.
prompts.satisfied: Return JSON only: {"record_type":"satisfied","data":{"next_signal":"halt"},"reasoning":"goal complete or honest give_up"}
